articles.title: OF INDIVIDUAL CONTRIBUTORS AGREE
articles.summary: Notion just released new research based on a survey of 1,350 engineering, product, and design leaders [4].

articles.title: chasing information, and they're becoming increasingly misaligned
articles.summary: on the work that actually matters.

articles.title: accelerating innovation: read the full research report
THE END OF THE USER INTERFACE?
articles.summary: AI agents - and eventually quantum computing - are reshaping interfaces from visual control panels into conversational, trust-based, anticipatory experiences. To stay relevant, product developers must shift toward systems design, ethics, and intelligent interaction strategy.

articles.title: OPTIMIZE FOR FEELING LUCKY
articles.summary: Career choices feel high-stakes, but the best growth often comes from jobs that make us feel lucky, not the ones we over-engineer. Forget the perfect plan - trust your intuition, test roles like a coat, and remember no choice is forever.

articles.title: THE EXECUTION TRAP FOR PRODUCT MANAGERS
articles.summary: Successful product management requires pairing orchestration with inspiration. Translating stakes into tangible impact, celebrating early wins, and using storytelling to spark urgency transforms stalled execution into sustained momentum.

articles.title: STOP SCORING EVERYTHING: HOW TO PRIORITIZE WITH STRATEGY
articles.summary: Filter by strategy first, then rank what remains. This cuts noise, sharpens decisions, and makes the team more strategic.

articles.title: 👻 VIBE-CODED PROTOTYPE IS A BLACK BOX. WE OPENED IT.
THE RISING CONSUMER TO ENTERPRISE AI PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: AI is reviving consumer software with higher ARPU, faster growth, and stronger enterprise bridges. Success hinges on simple onboarding, influencer traction, aggressive marketing, enterprise-focused GTM, and continuous AI improvement.

articles.title: PMF PLAYBOOKS: WHAT FORBES AI 50 STARTUPS TEACH US ABOUT GETTING IT RIGHT
articles.summary: AI startups hit PMF in about 3 years on average, but consumer-focused and community-led companies often get there in under 18 months. Enterprise players face longer paths, making sector and go-to-market strategy the biggest determinants of speed.

articles.title: LAW & ORDER: GPU
articles.summary: Legal AI adoption remains shallow, with tools tackling narrow tasks while ChatGPT fills gaps. Breakout opportunities lie in aligning with legal business models, building trust, and reimagining workflows for collaboration and scale.

articles.title: YOUR EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE IS SABOTAGING YOUR CAREER
articles.summary: Unmanaged emotional labor drains focus and fuels burnout, especially in high-pressure roles. Redirecting intensity toward problem clarity, setting boundaries, and sharing emotional responsibility strengthens both career sustainability and team effectiveness.

articles.title: HOW TO TAME IMPOSTER SYNDROME
articles.summary: Imposter syndrome is a normal response to risk, not a flaw.

articles.title: WHERE IS MY TIME?! WHY WE FEEL THERE'S NEVER ENOUGH
articles.summary: “Busy” is often a choice, not a truth.
